description:
🕒 09:30–12:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-hannouv-onedaymarch/

This guided walk follows the roughly 10 km course from last year's Hanno New Green Two-Day March. You'll explore Hanno's rich natural attractions while learning about the city's forest heritage. Walk through the pleasant fresh green season visiting Hanno River, Tenranzan, Azuma Gorge, Asahiyama, and more.

【Fee】Adult ¥1,000 | Student ¥500

【Capacity】50 people

【Guide】Saitama Hanno University staff

【What to bring】Drinking water; rain gear if weather requires

【More info】Saitama Hanno University website: https://hanno-univ.net/
location: 集合 NPO法人埼玉ハンノウ大学事務局 （飯能市仲町6-1(旧飯能織物協同組合事務所棟) 西武池袋線飯能駅下車徒歩7分
summary: Easy New Green One-Day March—Enjoy Hanno's Forest Culture City
